revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:星宮神社]][[ko:호시노미야 신사]]
Hoshimiya Shrine, meaning Star Palace Shrine, is a name of Shinto Shrines primarily associated with [[Futsunushi]]. They are thus related to {{ill|Katori Shrines|ja|香取神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katori Shrines|qq=}}.
{{ill|Iwasaku and Nesaku|en|Iwasaku and Nesaku|qid=Q11287276|lt=Iwasaku and Nesaku|1=Iwasaku and Nesaku}} are also worshipped there was with [[Amatsu-Mikaboshi]] '''Hoshimiya Shrine''' (星宮神社, *Hoshinomiya Jinja* or *Hoshimiya Jinja*) is the name of several {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}s in Japan.
== List of Hoshimiya Shrines == * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Sano)|ja|星宮神社 (佐野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Sano)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Hoshinomiya Shrine (Sano, Tochigi)|qid=Q11512856}} – Located in {{ill|Ōkura-chō (Sano)|ja|大蔵町 (佐野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkura-chō (Sano)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Sano, Tochigi|en|Sano, Tochigi|qid=Q646912|lt=Sano, Tochigi|1=Sano, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Shimotsuke)|ja|星宮神社 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Shimotsuke)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579041|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Shimotsuke)}} – Located in {{ill|Shimotsuke, Tochigi|en|Shimotsuke, Tochigi|qid=Q851804|lt=Shimotsuke, Tochigi|1=Shimotsuke, Tochigi}}, Tochigi Prefecture, in the {{ill|Shitakoyama|ja|下古山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitakoyama|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} area. Also known as {{ill|Shitakoyama Hoshimiya Shrine|ja|下古山星宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitakoyama Hoshimiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579044|1=Shitakoyama Hoshimiya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Azusa)|ja|星宮神社 (栃木市梓町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Azusa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579046|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Azusa)}} – Located in {{ill|Azusa, Tochigi|ja|梓町 (栃木市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azusa, Tochigi|1=Azusamachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11538713}}, {{ill|Tochigi (city)|en|Tochigi (city)|qid=Q44830|lt=Tochigi, Tochigi|1=Tochigi (city)}}, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Hirayanagi)|ja|星宮神社 (栃木市平柳町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Hirayanagi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579049|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Hirayanagi)}} – Located in {{ill|Hirayanagi, Tochigi|ja|平柳町 (栃木市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirayanagi, Tochigi|1=Hirayanagimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11483135}}, Tochigi City, Tochigi Prefecture. Also known as {{ill|Hirayanagi Hoshimiya Shrine|ja|平柳星宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirayanagi Hoshimiya Shrine|qq=}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Onoguchi)|ja|星宮神社 (栃木市小野口町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Onoguchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579051|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Onoguchi)}} – Located in {{ill|Onoguchi-chō|ja|小野口町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onoguchi-chō|1=Onoguchimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463946}}, Tochigi City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Ōhiramachi-Tomida)|ja|星宮神社 (栃木市大平町富田)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Ōhiramachi-Tomida)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579053|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Tochigi, Ōhiramachi-Tomida)}} – Located in {{ill|Ōhiramachi-Tomida|ja|大平町富田|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhiramachi-Tomida|1=Ōhiramachi Tomida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11457139}}, Tochigi City, Tochigi Prefecture. Also known as {{ill|Tomida Hoshimiya Shrine|ja|富田星宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomida Hoshimiya Shrine|1=Tomita Hoshinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q60989150}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Ryūgasaki)|ja|星宮神社 (龍ケ崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Ryūgasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579056|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Ryūgasaki)}} – Located in {{ill|Wakashiba-chō|ja|若柴町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakashiba-chō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ryūgasaki, Ibaraki|en|Ryūgasaki, Ibaraki|qid=Q844138|lt=Ryūgasaki, Ibaraki|1=Ryūgasaki, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Hannō, Akazawa)|ja|星宮神社 (飯能市赤沢)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Hannō, Akazawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579058|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Hannō, Akazawa)}} – Located in {{ill|Akazawa, Hannō|ja|赤沢 (飯能市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akazawa, Hannō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Hannō|en|Hannō|qid=Q850472|lt=Hannō, Saitama|1=Hannō}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Hannō, Kaminaguri)|ja|星宮神社 (飯能市上名栗)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Hannō, Kaminaguri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579060|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Hannō, Kaminaguri)}} – Located in {{ill|Kaminaguri|ja|上名栗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaguri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Hannō City, Saitama Prefecture. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Gujo)|ja|星宮神社 (郡上市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Gujo)|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Gujo)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11512857}} – Located in {{ill|Minami-chō, Takasago|ja|美並町高砂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minami-chō, Takasago|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Gujō, Gifu|en|Gujō, Gifu|qid=Q857243|lt=Gujo, Gifu|1=Gujō, Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hoshimiya Shrine (Nagoya)|ja|星宮神社 (名古屋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshimiya Shrine (Nagoya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579063|1=Hoshimiya Shrine (Nagoya)}} – Located in {{ill|Honhoshizakichō|ja|本星崎町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honhoshizakichō|1=Motohoshizaki-chō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q38276297}}, {{ill|Minami-ku, Nagoya|en|Minami-ku, Nagoya|qid=Q1155286|lt=Minami-ku, Nagoya|1=Minami-ku, Nagoya}}, {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|qid=Q11751|lt=Nagoya, Aichi|1=Nagoya}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Also known as {{ill|Hoshizakimiya Shrine|ja|星崎宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshizakimiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579065|1=Hoshizakimiya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Kawahara Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|河原神社 (清須市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kawahara Shrine (Kiyosu)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Ahara-Miyahigashi|ja|阿原宮東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ahara-Miyahigashi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kiyosu|en|Kiyosu|qid=Q502407|lt=Kiyosu, Aichi|1=Kiyosu}}, Aichi Prefecture. Also known as {{ill|Hoshinomiya Shrine|ja|星野宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoshinomiya Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579069|1=Hoshinomiya Shrine}}.
